description_long: This house features a rectangular brick structure with a central arched entryway and symmetrical window placement on both sides. The roof is primarily flat with some raised sections, and there is a prominent outdoor staircase leading to a rooftop terrace. A manicured lawn with a tree and hedges frames one side of the house, while a paved driveway extends from the main entrance. The windows are evenly spaced and rectangular, contributing to a balanced, classical appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and colonial architectural influences, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A brick house with a central arched entry, flat roof sections, symmetrical windows, and a rooftop terrace accessed by an outdoor staircase. The property includes a manicured lawn, hedges, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, symmetrical windows, driveway, and lawn with a tree and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, flat roof sections, and the extension of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor staircase, rooftop terrace, and the back lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tree, hedges, and the rear elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched entry with double doors, flanked by steps and a paved driveway, no porch or columns.
